name: Sunday Eggless Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 heads romaine lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic and anchovies in a large wooden salad bowl using the back of a fork.
2. Mix the mustard and vinegar in a separate bowl.
3. Slowly beat in the olive oil until combined.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Reserve 3/4 cup of this dressing for later use.
6. Toss the lettuce with the remaining dressing, then sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and croutons.
7. Serve immediately.
Makes 8-10 servings, plus enough to:
Reserve 6 tablespoons dressing for Broiled Scampi Romano on Monday,
and
Reserve 6 tablespoons dressing for Cold Roast Beef with Two Sauces on Wednesday.
